chapter_title.en: Chapter 56 – The silence and preservation of the tongue

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (222/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (222/ 8)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِنْ كَانَ فِي شَيْ‏ءٍ شُؤْمٌ فَفِي اللِّسَانِ .

en.hubeali: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘If there is anything with evil omen in it, so it is in the tongue’.
en.sarwar: 17. Through the same chain of narrators it is narrated from the Messenger of Allah (a.s.) has said, the following: “The Messenger of Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘If there is any wickedness, it is in the tongue.’”
